data.body: 568c CLAIMED (r1 PASS 0-blocking, matching fp) + oracle authored: reducer test_reducer_snapshot.py +4 creation_channel tests (2 RED legacy-snapshot inference, 2 guards incl the LOAD-BEARING recorded-not-clobbered), lifecycle test_creation_channel_compaction.py 6 tests (1 RED rollback_recovery, 5 durability guards; recorded already survives compaction via e622 projection -- the only NEW behavior is process_snapshot re-inference for legacy snapshots missing the field). Held out: near_miss/recorded_not_clobbered/already_inferred + entire lifecycle file; gave implementer only reducer infers_jira. Dispatched 568c implementer (core: guarded process_snapshot call; fsck stale-channel detect+repair; docs rollback matrix). Full oracle stashed.
